identifier.label: Email or username
identifier.description: Use the email address or username you signed up with.

privacy.label: I have read and agree to the <link>Privacy Policy</link>
privacy.error: You must accept the Privacy Policy to continue.

success.title: Check your email
success.sent: We've sent you an email to confirm your account.
success.check: Check your inbox and follow the instructions to activate your account.
success.checkSpam: If you can't find it, check your spam folder. If it's not there either, you can resend it.
success.resendSuccess: ✓ Email sent. Wait before trying again.
success.resendError: ✗ Could not send email. Please try again.

status.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.INVALID_USERNAME: Username must be 3–30 characters and contain only letters, numbers, underscores (_), or hyphens (-).
validation.INVALID_EMAIL_OR_USERNAME: Enter a valid email address or username.
validation.USERNAME_TOO_SHORT: Username must be at least 3 characters.
validation.USERNAME_TOO_LONG: Username must be no more than 30 characters.
validation.INVALID_USERNAME_FORMAT: Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscores (_), and hyphens (-).

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Transcendence, we value your privacy. This policy describes what data we collect, how we use it, how we store it, and what rights you have regarding your personal information.

dataCollected.title: Data Collected
dataCollected.description: When you use our platform, we may collect the following information:

items.email: Email address (used for account registration and authentication)
items.username: Username (chosen by you to identify yourself in the game)
items.usage: Usage data (game history, scores, and interaction logs)
items.technical: Technical data (browser type, device information, and IP address for security purposes)

dataUsage.title: How We Use Your Data
dataUsage.description: The data we collect is used exclusively for the following purposes:

items.gameplay: Providing the game experience and social features
items.communication: Sending necessary communications related to your account

storage.title: Data Storage and Security
storage.description: Your data is stored securely on our servers. We implement industry-standard security measures including encrypted connections (HTTPS), secure password hashing, and regular security audits. We retain your data only for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you with our services.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.description: As a user, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:

items.access: Right to access your personal data
items.deletion: Right to request deletion of your data

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or wish to exercise your rights, please contact us through our GitHub repository or reach out to the project administrators.
